zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Chenduit於1279年出生在英國薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘時，她的父親William Chenduit19歲，母親Eleanor de Beauchamp de Hatch18歲。她於1300年之前與Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1327年5月9日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Chenduit于1279年出生在英国薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘时，她的父亲William Chenduit19岁，母亲Eleanor de Beauchamp de Hatch18岁。她于1300年之前与Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1327年5月9日在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈契 比奧甘。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Chenduit was born in 1279, in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, her father, William Chenduit, was 19 and her mother, Eleanor de Beauchamp de Hatch, was 18. She married Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset before 1300, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 9 May 1327, in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Chenduit est née en 1279, à Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Chenduit, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Beauchamp de Hatch, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset avant 1300, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1327, à Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat vor 1300 in England, United Kingdom Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1327 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Chenduit è nata il nel 1279 nel Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, England, sua padre, William Chenduit, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Beauchamp de Hatch, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset prima del 1300, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 maggio 1327, nel Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Hatch Beauchamp, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Chenduitが1279年にイギリスソメルセトハトチ ビーウチャンップで生まれた時，父William Chenduitは19歳，母Eleanor de Beauchamp de Hatchは18歳であった。1300年以前にイギリスイギリスでSir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somersetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1327年5月9日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトハトチ ビーウチャンップで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトハトチ ビーウチャンップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Chenduit(이)가 1279년 영국 서머세트 해트치 보챔프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Chenduit(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Beauchamp de Hatch(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1300년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 해트치 보챔프에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 해트치 보챔프에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset antes 1300, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Chenduit родилась в 1279 г. в местности хач бочамп, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Chenduit было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Beauchamp de Hatch, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Somerset перед 1300 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 9 мая 1327 г. в местности хач бочамп, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности хач бочамп, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
